stemHtml: Your aircraft and an intruder both are TCAS II equipped. If the transponder of the intruder is switched off or unserviceable…

options.a: the intruder is invisible to your TCAS equipment.
options.b: the information available to your TCAS equipment is two dimensional only.
options.c: the intruder remains visible to your TCAS equipment, but only RAs (Resolution Advisories) can be generated.
options.d: the intruder remains visible to your TCAS equipment, but only TAs (Traffic Advisories) can be generated.
